title: Resources: Canadian Integrated Program for Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance (CIPARS) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canadian Integrated Program for Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance (CIPARS): Resources
- Surveillance reports
The links on this page include additional information on antimicrobial use and antimicrobial resistance from Government of Canada and external websites, as well as links to information that may be referenced in CIPARS reporting. Also included are links to information on other antimicrobial resistance activities within and external to the Government of Canada.*
*This list is not exhaustive.
- Government of Canada

## Government of Canada
- Antimicrobial Resistance
- Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) (Health Canada)
- Statement from the Minister of Health on the Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) Network Report
- Canadian Antimicrobial Resistance Surveillance System (CARSS) Report, 2022
- Categorization of Antimicrobial Drugs Based on Importance in Human Medicine
- FoodNet Canada (Centre for Food-borne, Environmental and Zoonotic Infectious Diseases, Public Health Agency of Canada)
- National Microbiology Laboratory (Public Health Agency of Canada)
- Veterinary Drugs Directorate (Health Canada)
- List A: List of Certain Antimicrobial Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (Health Canada)
- Veterinary Antimicrobial Sales Reporting (Health Canada)
- Science Fact Sheet: Antimicrobial Resistance (Canadian Food Inspection Agency)
- Compendium of Medicating Ingredients Brochure (Canadian Food Inspection Agency)
- Communicable Diseases and Infection Control Updates
- Antimicrobial Awareness Week Canada
- Antimicrobial Resistance (OIE)
- Antimicrobial Resistance (WHO)
- BC Centre for Disease control - Antibiotic Resistance (BCCDC)
- Canadian Animal Health Surveillance System (CAHSS) Antimicrobial Use and Resistance Network
- Canadian Pork Council – Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) and Antimicrobial Use (AMU)
- Canadian Veterinary Medical Association - Veterinary Oversight of Antimicrobial Use in Animals in Canada
- Chicken Farmers of Canada AMU Strategy
- Danish Programme for surveillance of antimicrobial consumption and resistance in bacteria from food animals, food and humans (DANMAP)
- European Surveillance of Veterinary Antimicrobial Consumption (ESVAC)
- Global Antimicrobial Resistance and Use Surveillance System (GLASS)
- National Antimicrobial Resistance Monitoring System for Enteric Bacteria (NARMS)
- Network on quantification of veterinary Antimicrobial usage at herd level and Analysis, CommunicaTion and benchmarkING to improve responsible usage (AACTING)
- Transatlantic Taskforce on Antimicrobial Resistance (TATFAR)
CIPARS welcomes suggestions for additional related links. Please contact us .
